instruction: Fix parse_page_size(value) to accept an integer or an ASCII base-10 digit string from 1 through 500. Reject booleans, unsupported types, padded or signed strings, non-ASCII or non-digit strings, and out-of-range values with ValueError.
acceptance_criteria: parse_page_size accepts integer values from 1 through 500
parse_page_size accepts ASCII digit strings from 1 through 500
parse_page_size raises ValueError for booleans and unsupported types
parse_page_size raises ValueError for padded, signed, non-ASCII, or non-digit strings
parse_page_size raises ValueError for values outside 1 through 500

verifiers.name: integer-values
verifiers.criterion: parse_page_size accepts integer values from 1 through 500

verifiers.name: digit-strings
verifiers.criterion: parse_page_size accepts ASCII digit strings from 1 through 500

verifiers.name: invalid-types
verifiers.criterion: parse_page_size raises ValueError for booleans and unsupported types

verifiers.name: invalid-format
verifiers.criterion: parse_page_size raises ValueError for padded, signed, non-ASCII, or non-digit strings

verifiers.name: range
verifiers.criterion: parse_page_size raises ValueError for values outside 1 through 500
